an1.287:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no occasion for good bodily conduct to produce a result that is unwished for, unwanted, and disagreeable. That occasion does not exist.
an1.287:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, and the occasion does exist for good bodily conduct to produce a result that is wished for, wanted, and agreeable. That occasion exists."
an1.288-289:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no occasion for good verbal conduct … good mental conduct to produce a result that is unwished for, unwanted, and disagreeable. That occasion does not exist.
an1.288-289:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, and the occasion does exist for good mental conduct to produce a result that is wished for, wanted, and agreeable. That occasion exists."
an1.290:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no occasion for one who has engaged in bad bodily conduct, on account of that, owing to that cause, to be reborn after death in a good destination, a heavenly world. That occasion does not exist.
an1.290:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, and the occasion does exist for one who has engaged in bad bodily conduct, on account of that, owing to that cause, to be reborn after death in a state of loss, a bad destination, a place of ruin, hell. That occasion exists."
an1.291-292:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no occasion for one who has engaged in bad verbal conduct … for one who has engaged in bad mental conduct, on account of that, owing to that cause, to be reborn after death in a good destination, a heavenly world. That occasion does not exist.
an1.291-292:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, and the occasion does exist for one who has engaged in bad mental conduct, on account of that, owing to that cause, to be reborn after death in a state of loss, a bad destination, a place of ruin, hell. That occasion exists."
an1.293:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no occasion for one who has engaged in good bodily conduct, on account of that, owing to that cause, to be reborn after death in a state of loss, a bad destination, a place of ruin, hell. That occasion does not exist.
an1.293:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, and the occasion does exist for one who has engaged in good bodily conduct, on account of that, owing to that cause, to be reborn after death in a good destination, a heavenly world. That occasion exists."
an1.294-295:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, and there is no occasion for one who has engaged in good verbal conduct … for one who has engaged in good mental conduct, on account of that, owing to that cause, to be reborn after death in a state of loss, a bad destination, a place of ruin, hell. That occasion does not exist.
an1.294-295:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, and the occasion does exist for one who has engaged in good mental conduct, on account of that, owing to that cause, to be reborn after death in a good destination, a heavenly world. That occasion exists."
an1.294-295:1.4: The chapter on occasions is concluded.
